acepta_comunicaciones: I wish to receive commercial communications and news from SportTracker.
acepta_rgpd_1: I have read and accept the
avatar_temporada: You can include a new avatar each season
callback_text2: Your browser might be blocking local storage or you opened the callback in another tab. If it stays here, go back and repeat the login from the same tab.
claim: Your sports history, season by season
competicion_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm that you want to delete this competition. All data will be lost. This action is irreversible.
competicion_nombre_info: For example: pre-season, tournaments, league, playoffs...
consulta_texto: Tell us briefly about your query…
contacta_nuevo_deporte: Contact us if you would like to include any other sports.
contacto_acepta_condiciones: I accept the use of my data to manage this contact request.
contacto_text2: Fill out the form and we will reply shortly.
contacto_text3: Thank you! We have received your message and will reply as soon as possible.
cookies_aceptacion_texto: We use cookies for essential purposes, analytics, functionality and marketing. You can reject all of them except the necessary ones, or configure them.
cookies_analitica_texto: Usage measurement. Requires consent except in the AEPD exempt mode.
cuenta_cancelar_texto: Are you sure you want to cancel your account? This action cannot be undone.
cuenta_cancelar_texto_modal: If you cancel your account, you will lose access to all data and features of the application. This action is irreversible.
cuenta_sin_recibos: There are no receipts for this account.
dashboard_suscribete_texto: To start registering athletes you must subscribe to one of our plans.
deportista_no_encontrado_mensaje: There is no information in the system about this athlete.
equipo_necesita_club_aviso: To create a team, you must first create a club.
equipo_nombre_info: For example: Junior A, Cadet B, Orange Youth,...
error_asientos_indisponibles: You do not have any more athlete registrations available. Renew your subscription.
facturas_recientes_detalle: Latest payments processed on your account.
facturas_vacias_detalle: Once you complete a payment, the invoice will appear here.
galeria_aviso: Remember that images and videos are stored on the device from which you captured or linked. When accessing the gallery you will only see the images and videos that are stored on the device from which you access.
galeria_vacia: There are no images or videos of this match.
home_deportes_texto: Record the sports history of these sports
home_feature1_text: Record and track the sports history of your favorite players.
home_feature2_text: Basketball, soccer, indoor soccer, handball, volleyball, rugby, water polo, roller hockey and field hockey
home_feature3_text: Analyze the performance of each game and season. You will have the history of their victories, losses, points scored, goals scored,...
home_feature4_text: Capture and store the best moments of each match to always remember them.
home_feature5_text: Record data even without an internet connection and automatically sync it when you regain connection.
home_feature6_text: You do not need to download any App from any official store. You use it from your browser.
home_main_text1: Were you looking for an App to save the statistics of your matches or your children's matches? With Deporteen you can now save forever the goals, points, assists, minutes played,... match by match and add photos and videos to them. A memory for life.
imagenes_guarda_local: Images are saved locally on your device. They are not uploaded to any server.
jugador_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm that you want to remove this player. All data relating to this player will be deleted. This action is irreversible.

sections.title: 1. Owner details
sections.html:
The website and the {{product.app_name}} app ({{product.domain}}) are owned by {{company.name}}, VAT {{company.nif}}, {{company.address}}, {{company.country}}. Contact: {{company.email}}.

Trade registry: {{company.reg_merc}}

sections.title: 2. Purpose and acceptance
sections.html: Accessing {{product.app_name}} implies acceptance of this Legal Notice and, where applicable, the Terms of Use.

sections.title: 3. Users and minors
sections.html: The service is for adults. Children under 16 cannot create an account. Adults may record sports data of third parties pursuant to the Content & Image Policy.

sections.title: 4. IP rights
sections.html: Software and design belong to {{company.name}} or its licensors.

sections.title: 5. Liability
sections.html: {{company.name}} is not liable for user-stored data, images or videos on the device, nor for misuse of the app.

sections.title: 6. Third-party services
sections.html: We integrate Supabase (EU/Ireland), Stripe (payments), {{providers.hosting}} (hosting) and {{providers.analytics}} (analytics). See the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 7. Governing law
sections.html: Spanish law applies. Consumer jurisdiction rules prevail.

sections.title: 1. Controller
sections.html: Controller: {{company.name}} ({{company.email}}). No DPO appointed for now.

sections.title: 2. Data we process
sections.html:
• Account: name, surname, email, optional phone.
  • Service use: sports stats created by the user about third parties.
  • Media: images/videos stored locally, not in cloud.
  • Payments: handled by Stripe.
  • Analytics: {{providers.analytics}}.

sections.title: 3. Purposes & legal bases
sections.html:
• Service & subscription (contract).
  • Analytics (consent).
  • Renewal notifications (consent).
  • Security/fraud (legitimate interest).

sections.title: 4. Retention
sections.html:
• Account and records while account exists. Billing data: 6 years.
  • Security logs: 12 months.

sections.title: 5. Recipients
sections.html:
• Supabase (EU/Ireland)
  • Stripe
  • {{providers.hosting}}
  • {{providers.analytics}}

sections.title: 6. Rights
sections.html: Contact {{legal.data_subject_email}} to exercise GDPR rights. Response within one month.

sections.title: 7. Minors
sections.html: Under-16s cannot create an account. Adults must ensure consent to process minors' images/data.

sections.title: 8. Security measures
sections.html: Encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest in database services, access control, backup copies at the provider and good minimization practices. Media (photos/videos) are saved to the local storage of the device controlled by the user.

sections.title: 9. Minors
sections.html: Those under 16 cannot create an account. Adults who register data or images of minors declare that they have sufficient legitimacy and respect the Content and Image Rights Policy.

sections.title: 1. What cookies we use
sections.html: Only necessary cookies and, if consented, analytics ({{providers.analytics}}).

sections.title: 2. Categories
sections.html:
• Necessary: login, security.
  • Analytics: usage measurement (consent-based).
  • Functional: non-essential improvements.
  • Marketing: currently unused.

sections.title: 3. List
sections.html:
Necessary

  • Supabase session: {{cookies.session}}
  • Stripe: {{cookies.stripe}}

Analytics

  • GA4: {{cookies.ga4}}

sections.title: 4. Manage consent
sections.html: Use the cookie banner or your browser settings to withdraw consent.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.html: Terms for using {{product.app_name}}.

sections.title: 2. Account and access
sections.html: The account is personal and for people over 16. An adult can register third-party athletes.

sections.title: 3. Plans and payments
sections.html: Payments are processed with Stripe. The invoice is issued by Stripe.

sections.title: 4. Withdrawal and refunds
sections.html: You have 14 days from the purchase to request a refund if you have not consumed benefits that legally prevent it.

sections.title: 5. User content
sections.html: You are responsible for the data and images you store. You must comply with current legislation and our Content Policy.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.html: The service is provided “as is” within reasonable diligence.

sections.title: 1. Purchase
sections.html: Payments via Stripe. 14-day withdrawal right as applicable.

sections.title: 2. Renewals and notices
sections.html: We may send you renewal notices if you consent.

sections.title: 3. Billing
sections.html: The invoice is the one generated by Stripe and will be available on your payment receipt.

sections.title: 4. Withdrawal
sections.html: 14 days of withdrawal in accordance with consumer regulations, with applicable legal exceptions.

sections.title: 1. Scope
sections.html: Rules for user content and image rights.

sections.title: 2. Image rights
sections.html: If you store images or videos from third parties, you must have their consent. In the case of minors, consent must be granted by their legal representative.

sections.title: 3. Prohibitions
sections.html: It is prohibited to upload or retain content that is illegal, defamatory or violates the rights of third parties.

sections.title: 4. Removal of content
sections.html: We may require you to remove content that violates this policy or the law. You can contact at {{legal.data_subject_email}}.

limite_deportistas_alcanzado: You have reached the limit of allowed athletes
limite_deportistas_alcanzado_dashboard: You have reached the limit of athletes in your subscription. Expand your subscription to add more
limite_deportistas_info: Your current subscription allows you to create up to the maximum configured athletes. To add more, you can expand your subscription.
media_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm that you want to delete this file
mi_galeria_vacia: You have not uploaded any photos or videos yet. Start capturing moments from each match.
no_cierres_app: Don't close the app or lock the screen.
pago_completado: The payment has been completed successfully and your subscription has been activated.
partido_eliminar_texto_modal: If you delete this match, all its data and associated files will be removed. This action is irreversible.
player_nuevo_texto2: Next, indicate all the participations the athlete has in one or more sports and categories.
recibos_ver_question: Do you need all your receipts?
recuperacion_enviada: We have sent you an email to recover your password. If it doesn't appear in your inbox, check your spam folder.
renovacion_proxima_texto: Your subscription expires in the near future, you can access it here to renew.
sesion_iniciar_aviso: You must log in to subscribe.
sin_competiciones_actuales: There are currently no competitions registered.
sin_preview: The file was not found. It is possibly saved on another of your devices.
storage_cloud_subtitle: Store your match photos and videos in the Deporteen cloud (Cloudflare R2). Access from any device, never lose your files when you change your phone.
storage_feature_multiequipo: Ideal for multiple teams and seasons
storage_include_ssl: SSL encryption in transit and at rest
storage_pago_cancelado: Payment was cancelled. You can retry whenever you want.
storage_pago_completado: Great! Your cloud storage is now active.
storage_selecciona_plan: Please select a plan to continue.
storage_stripe_texto: Payment is securely processed by Stripe. We never store your card data. You can request a refund within the first 14 days.
stripe_coupons_create_description: Create a new coupon for your customers
stripe_coupons_create_dialog_description: Create a new coupon for your customers
stripe_coupons_create_success_descriptio: The coupon has been created successfully.
stripe_coupons_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this coupon? This action cannot be undone.
stripe_coupons_description: Manage the discount codes available in Stripe.
stripe_coupons_edit_metadata_hint: Provide a JSON object with key-value pairs.
stripe_invoices_description: Monitor invoice statuses, due dates, and outstanding balances.
stripe_invoices_filters_search_placehold: Search by customer, number, or ID
stripe_payments_description: Review the status of one-off charges processed through Stripe.
stripe_payments_empty: There are no one-time payments yet.
stripe_price_amount_hint: It will be converted to the correct unit amount automatically.
stripe_price_confirm_archive_description: When you archive a price it remains available for existing subscriptions but can't be used for new purchases.
stripe_price_manage_status_hint: Use this switch to enable or disable the price for new purchases.
stripe_price_manage_subtitle: You can enable or disable the price and adjust its internal name. To change the amount create a new price.
stripe_price_modal_subtitle: Configure the amount, currency, and charge type.
stripe_price_replace_description: Enter the details of the new price. The previous price will be archived automatically afterwards.
stripe_price_replace_error: We couldn't create the new price.
stripe_price_type_hint: After creation you can only activate or deactivate the price.
stripe_prices_description: Define the amounts and currencies of your plans in Stripe.
stripe_product_create_price_help: When enabled, a default price will be generated automatically in Stripe.
stripe_product_description_placeholder: Describe the product for your customers.
stripe_product_modal_subtitle: Set a name, description, and optionally an initial price.
stripe_product_price_hint: Enter the amount in the selected currency; we will convert it to the correct unit amount.
stripe_products_description: Manage your Stripe catalog from a single place.
stripe_subscriptions_description: Track subscription status and renewal periods.
suscripcion_inactiva_texto: You must renew your subscription to be able to add new matches, and expand it to include new athletes.
suscripcion_inactiva_titulo: You do not have any active subscriptions at this time.
suscripcion_planes_texto:
All subscription plans include the following features: · Unlimited access to all recorded history.
· Export history to .xls.
· Images and videos are saved on the device itself.
· 14-day period to request a refund.
suscripcion_renovar_texto: Select one of our plans to renew your subscription.
suscripcion_texto1: Register an athlete if you have a valid free access code. If you want to register more than one athlete, you must indicate it in the form.
suscripcion_texto2: You can register 1 athlete with an access code. If you need to add more athletes, you must complete the payment via Stripe. You can always create one now with a code and add more later via Stripe.
suscripciones_no_registradas: You do not have any subscription at this time.
storage_settings_subtitle: Choose where to store your match photos and videos.
storage_settings_local_description: Stores photos and videos on this device. It is fast and works offline, but it will not be available from other phones.
storage_settings_drive_description: Uploads photos and videos to your Google Drive so they are kept outside the device.
storage_settings_drive_unavailable_reaso: Connect Google Drive before selecting it as the default method.
storage_settings_drive_connected_session: Google Drive connected for this session.
storage_settings_r2_description_active: Your cloud storage is active until {DATE}.
storage_settings_r2_description_inactive: Subscribe to a storage plan to save media in DeporTeen Cloud.
storage_settings_r2_unavailable_reason: There is no active storage plan.
